column1: # - local-dest    : path under $MODELS_ROOT where weights are stored
# - default-preset: service/name activated on first pull (- = none, set manually)
# - description   : shown in `rig models registry` and `rig models` list
# Unknown models: `rig models pull <repo>` prompts interactively and offers to append here.

column4: Qwen3.5 27B fp4 — primary LLM. Code, tools, long context (65k). Daily driver.
Qwen2-VL 7B — multimodal vision-language. Powers image gen and edit workflows.
FLUX.1-dev — battle-tested text-to-image. Best node/workflow ecosystem support.
FLUX.1-Fill — inpainting and instruction-guided image editing.
FLUX.2-klein — fastest FLUX.2 variant. Apache 2.0, no gate. Good for iteration.

column1: # FLUX.2-dev fp8: verify exact slug at huggingface.co/black-forest-labs then uncomment:

column4: FLUX.2-dev fp8 — best quality at ~50% VRAM vs bf16. Default diffusion preset.
ControlNet Canny — edge-guided generation. Feed a canny edge map as condition.
ControlNet Union Pro — multi-condition in one model (canny/depth/pose/scribble).
ControlNet Depth — depth-map conditioned generation. Use MiDaS/ZoeDepth preprocessor.
GFPGANv1.4 — face restoration. Repairs degraded or low-res faces with high fidelity.
Real-ESRGAN x4plus — general image upscaling 4x. Also ships anime variant.
inswapper_128 — ONNX face swap model. Core of the FaceFusion workflow.
StarVector 8B — raster image to clean SVG vector. Best for logos, icons, line art.
nomic-embed-text v1.5 — primary RAG embeddings. Fast, CPU-friendly, 768-dim.
